class.name: OcctlIoIges
class.description: Auto-generated wrapper for the OCCT-Light C header occtl_io_iges.h.

method.name: const_OCCTL_IO_IGES_H
method.description: @file occtl_io_iges.h @brief OCCT-Light: IGES file I/O (US PRO/IP 100 / ANSI). Reads and writes IGES 5.3 files via OCCT's @c DEIGES_Provider / @c DEIGES_ConfigurationNode. OCAF is linked privately and never reaches the public surface. UIDs are *not* preserved across the round-trip — the IGES file format has no UID slot. Use #occtl_uid_to_bytes / #occtl_uid_from_bytes for an out-of-band UID handshake if persistent identity is required. /.

methods.method:
<argument index="0" name="options" type="Ref" />
Initialises @p options to default values matching #OCCTL_IO_IGES_READ_OPTIONS_INIT. NULL-tolerant. @param[out] options Borrows it. May be NULL (no-op). @threadsafe Yes. @sa occtl_io_iges_read / [param options] Output parameter.

<argument index="0" name="options" type="Ref" />
Initialises @p options to default values matching #OCCTL_IO_IGES_WRITE_OPTIONS_INIT. NULL-tolerant. @param[out] options Borrows it. May be NULL (no-op). @threadsafe Yes. @sa occtl_io_iges_write / [param options] Output parameter.

<return type="Ref" />
<argument index="2" name="options" type="Ref" />
Reads an IGES file and ingests it into a freshly-created graph. @param[in] path Borrows it. NUL-terminated UTF-8 path to the file. Must be non-NULL. @param[out] out_graph Owns it. Receives a new graph on success; NULL on failure. @param[out] out_root Borrows it. Receives the NodeId of the root entity. @param[in] options Borrows it. May be NULL for defaults. @retval OCCTL_OK On success. @retval OCCTL_INVALID_ARGUMENT @p path, @p out_graph, or @p out_root is NULL. @retval OCCTL_VERSION_MISMATCH @p options has an unsupported struct_version. @retval OCCTL_IO_ERROR File not found or unreadable. @retval OCCTL_FORMAT_ERROR File contents were not a valid IGES stream. @threadsafe Yes. @sa occtl_io_iges_write, occtl_de_read / [param path] Input parameter. [param out_root] Output parameter. [param options] An optional [OcctlIoIgesReadOptions]. Pass null to use defaults. [return] A new [OcctlGraphHandle] handle, or null on failure.

<argument index="0" name="graph" type="Ref" />
<argument index="3" name="options" type="Ref" />
Writes the topology rooted at @p root to an IGES file. @param[in] graph Borrows it. Must be non-NULL. @param[in] root Root node id to serialise. @param[in] path Borrows it. NUL-terminated UTF-8 path; existing file is overwritten. @param[in] options Borrows it. May be NULL for defaults. @retval OCCTL_OK On success. @retval OCCTL_INVALID_ARGUMENT @p graph or @p path is NULL. @retval OCCTL_NOT_FOUND @p root is invalid or has been removed. @retval OCCTL_VERSION_MISMATCH @p options has an unsupported struct_version. @retval OCCTL_IO_ERROR Filesystem failure or unwritable file. @threadsafe Yes (read-only on graph). @sa occtl_io_iges_read, occtl_de_write / [param graph] A [OcctlGraphHandle] handle. [param root] A node. [param path] Input parameter. [param options] An optional [OcctlIoIgesWriteOptions]. Pass null to use defaults. [return] Status code ([constant OcctlCore.OCCTL_OK] on success).
